summary: PR #2375 decompiled and improved Rules Plus menu code in src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.c, with matching report evidence for three new function matches and several partial improvements. It also updated mnruleplus.h types to expose a RulePlus option enum, indexed rule values, and array-shaped animation settings.

key_files.role: Main Rules Plus menu decompilation work: added includes, data/table reshaping, helper inlines, and implementations for input handling, option display/update, animation callbacks, and menu object creation.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.c added 899 deleted 361 hunks 3
raw_diff: added mnRulePlus_SaveRules, mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible, fn_8023201C, mn_802324E4, mn_80232660, mn_802327A4, mn_80232D4C, fn_80232F44, mn_80233218
text_corpus issue_comment: decomp bot reports new matches for fn_8023201C, fn_80232F44, mn_80232660 and improvements for mn_80233218, mn_802327A4, mn_80232D4C, mn_802324E4, .data, .sdata2, .sbss

key_files.role: Type/header support for Rules Plus data: added RulePlusOption enum, rule_values union with named fields plus values array, and reshaped mn_803ED1D0_t animation settings arrays.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.h added 23 deleted 12 hunks 2
raw_diff mnruleplus.h: added enum RulePlusOption with RULEPLUS_TIME_LIMIT through RULEPLUS_COUNT
raw_diff mnruleplus.h: rule_values changed from plain struct to union containing named fields and u8 values[5]
raw_diff mnruleplus.h: x64 and x7C changed to AnimLoopSettings arrays with comments for selected/unselected states

what_changed.text: Replaced placeholder/decompiler-commented Rules Plus functions with C implementations for fn_8023201C, mn_802324E4, mn_80232660, mn_802327A4, mn_80232D4C, fn_80232F44, and mn_80233218.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed commented-out decompiler block and added concrete function bodies
text_corpus issue_comment: 3 new matches and 7 improvements in main/melee/mn/mnruleplus

what_changed.text: Added small source-level helpers for copying menu rule values to global game rules and deciding whether a Rules Plus option is visible for the current game mode.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline void mnRulePlus_SaveRules(void)
raw_diff: static inline s32 mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible(u8 sel)

what_changed.text: Recovered a more typed representation of rule values by adding a header union with named fields and an indexed values array, enabling code to update selected rule values by hovered_selection.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h: union containing time_limit, friendly_fire, pause, score, sd_penalty and u8 values[5]
raw_diff fn_8023201C: data->rule_values.values[mn_804A04F0.hovered_selection]

what_changed.text: Reshaped animation/static data for Rules Plus, including populated AnimLoopSettings tables and JObjIndices unions for packed joint indices.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mn_803ED270 and mn_803ED294 changed from zero-filled entries to frame ranges
raw_diff: typedef union JObjIndices { s32 packed; u8 idx[4]; }
raw_diff: static JObjIndices mn_804DBE40 and mn_804DBE48

what_changed.text: The automated report recorded text-section progress: +2132 matched bytes overall, with fn_8023201C, fn_80232F44, and mn_80232660 reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: Matched code 61.50% (+0.05%, +2132 bytes)
text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: 3 new matches table

smart_moves.text: Factored repeated rule-save behavior into mnRulePlus_SaveRules, reducing duplicated assignments to gmMainLib_8015CC34() fields in input paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnRulePlus_SaveRules writes stock_time_limit, friendly_fire, pause, score_display, unk_xc
raw_diff fn_8023201C: calls mnRulePlus_SaveRules in A/Start/B paths

smart_moves.text: Factored option visibility checks into mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible and reused the same predicate in selection wraparound logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible checks gm_801A4310, gmMainLib_8015EE0C, gmMainLib_8015EE44
raw_diff fn_8023201C: do-while loops skip hidden hovered_selection values

smart_moves.text: Used a union for rule_values so both semantic field access and indexed option access are available without raw byte pointer arithmetic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h: rule_values union with named struct and values[5]
raw_diff fn_8023201C: indexed values access for confirmed_selection

smart_moves.text: Used a JObjIndices union to represent packed s32 joint-index data as byte indices when iterating over JObjs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef union JObjIndices
raw_diff mn_802324E4: local_indices = mn_804DBE40; jobjs[local_indices.idx[i]]

decomp_lessons.lesson: When menu state has both named rule fields and selection-indexed behavior, a union of named fields plus a small values array can express both access patterns cleanly and avoid raw offset code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h: rule_values union
raw_diff fn_8023201C: data->rule_values.values[mn_804A04F0.hovered_selection]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Packed integer data used as multiple joint indices can be represented with a local union exposing byte lanes, making loops over JObj indices clearer than treating the packed value as an opaque s32.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef union JObjIndices
raw_diff mn_802324E4: for loop over local_indices.idx[i]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated visibility conditions in both input navigation and object update code are good candidates for a helper predicate when the same game-mode gates recur.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible
raw_diff fn_8023201C: wraparound navigation calls mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible

naming_conventions.name: mnRulePlus_SaveRules
naming_conventions.convention: Semantic helper name with subsystem prefix and verb phrase for copying current menu rule values to global game rules.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline void mnRulePlus_SaveRules(void)
raw_diff: helper body writes gmMainLib_8015CC34() fields from MenuRulesPlusData

naming_conventions.name: mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible
naming_conventions.convention: Boolean/predicate helper uses Is* naming and subsystem prefix for a menu option visibility decision.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline s32 mnRulePlus_IsOptionVisible(u8 sel)

naming_conventions.name: RulePlusOption
naming_conventions.convention: Enum constants use RULEPLUS_* names for menu options, ending with RULEPLUS_COUNT.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h: enum RulePlusOption with RULEPLUS_TIME_LIMIT, RULEPLUS_FRIENDLY_FIRE, RULEPLUS_PAUSE, RULEPLUS_SCORE, RULEPLUS_SD_PENALTY, RULEPLUS_STAGE_SELECT, RULEPLUS_COUNT

naming_conventions.name: JObjIndices
naming_conventions.convention: Type name describes packed JObj index storage; fields are named packed and idx.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef union { s32 packed; u8 idx[4]; } JObjIndices

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use a named-field plus indexed-array union for small menu option value groups
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mnruleplus, MenuRulesPlusData.rule_values was changed to a union containing named fields and u8 values[5], allowing semantic writes such as time_limit/friendly_fire while also supporting hovered_selection-indexed updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h: rule_values union
raw_diff fn_8023201C: indexed values access

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK in Rules Plus matched functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: fn_8023201C uses PAD_STACK(0x30) and mn_80232660 uses PAD_STACK(8); the bot report lists both as new 100.00% matches. Keep this as a tactic example, not a general style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff fn_8023201C: PAD_STACK(0x30)
raw_diff mn_80232660: PAD_STACK(8)
text_corpus issue_comment: 100.00% new matches for fn_8023201C and mn_80232660

accepted_candidate_records.title: Represent packed JObj index constants with a byte-index union when byte lanes are iterated
accepted_candidate_records.text: mnruleplus changed a packed s32 joint-index value into JObjIndices with packed and idx views, then iterated idx[i] to hide/show child JObjs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef union JObjIndices
raw_diff mn_802324E4: loop over local_indices.idx[i]

source_update_candidates.title: mnruleplus.c owns Rules Plus menu behavior and matching work
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.c contains Rules Plus menu logic including rule saving, option visibility, input handling, JObj animation updates, and menu object creation. PR #2375 matched fn_8023201C, fn_80232F44, and mn_80232660 and improved several related functions.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files
raw_diff added function bodies
text_corpus issue_comment decomp bot report
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level context for future mnruleplus decomp searches; should be curator-reviewed before adding to path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: mnruleplus.h defines Rules Plus menu state types
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.h defines MenuRulesPlusData and was updated in PR #2375 with RulePlusOption plus a rule_values union that supports both named rule fields and indexed option values.
evidence_refs: raw_diff mnruleplus.h enum RulePlusOption
raw_diff mnruleplus.h rule_values union
source_update_candidates.reason: Header ownership/type-recovery fact may help future decomp work in this subsystem.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK use from this PR into a global style rule; the loaded standards already require narrow evidence for matching tactics.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or human intent from the merge; no review comments are present.
Do not claim all changed functions fully matched; the bot report lists only fn_8023201C, fn_80232F44, and mn_80232660 as new 100% matches, while other functions are partial improvements.
